Client tracker preview for Expecting New Life Birth Services

This page shows how the embedded screenshots fit together as a working Notion setup for Expecting New Life Birth Services: An interview-first tracker for inquiries, consults, prenatal visits, birth-month on-call timing, and six-week postpartum follow-up across birth doula care, Body Ready Method 1:1 prep, and Spinning Babies classes.

Interview first Birth doula BRM 1:1 + class 6-week postpartum

What this is

A preview of a duplicate-ready Notion client tracker organized around the public workflow visible on the site.

Public workflow used

complimentary 30-minute interview, 2 prenatal video conferences, 24/7 on-call availability during your birth month, unlimited text, email, and phone support for 6 weeks after your birth

Today Ops Snapshot Client Board Client Record Interview + Consult View Birth Month + Active Care View Postpartum + Resource Follow-up View Setup Map

Why this shape

From overview to usable workspace

The first screenshots show the main views. The later screenshots show the editable structure that would be delivered: fields, focused tables, individual client pages, and starter records.

What it helps with

  • Keep interview requests, Koalender consults, and Cognitoforms class inquiries attached to the record that becomes a doula client.
  • Track birth doula, Body Ready Method 1:1, and Spinning Babies class clients on one board without a second tool.
  • Keep the six-week postpartum text/email/phone window tied to the same client record so nothing gets buried.
